Q&A

Increase your valid wagering to meet the next VIP level requirement. Progress updates as eligible bets settle.

VIP levels upgrade automatically when your cumulative wagering reaches the threshold for the next stage.

Rebate bonuses are calculated from eligible wagering at your current VIP rebate rate and credited according to program rules.

If retention requirements are not met within the review period, your VIP level may be adjusted according to the VIP rules.
